CustomField.description: Captures the cumulative realised FX gain or loss on an invoice by summing all related payment/credit FX differences. Used to reconcile invoice-level USD reporting with actual payment values.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total realised foreign currency gain or loss for this invoice, based on differences between the invoice FX rate and the payment date FX rates. Positive = gain; Negative = loss.
CustomField.label: Net Realised FX Gain/Loss
